reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion. Cargue combustible y automaticame me limpiaron los vidrios y pude utilizar los sanitarios con una higiene ejemplar.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. I filled up with fuel and they automatically cleaned my windows and I was able to use the restrooms, which were impeccably clean.
